title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explains how logarithmic transformations can be applied to images, using MC Escher's Print Gallery as a concrete example. The video teaches conformal maps from complex analysis and the complex logarithm function to show how mathematical structures reveal hidden patterns in art.
